code:
import io
import string

fn byte_at_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn parse_or_zero(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut s = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let c = byte_at_or_zero(input, i)
    if is_ws(c)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i + 1
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if j >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          if is_ws(byte_at_or_zero(input, j))
            scanning = false
          else
            j = j + 1
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(input, i, j)
      let val = parse_or_zero(tok)
      if count == 0
        a = val
      else if count == 1
        b = val
      else if count == 2
        s = val
      end
      count = count + 1
      i = j
    end
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
end
